news.title:
Haryana suspends 2 IAS officers amid Rs 590 crore IDFC First Bank scam probe.
Prime accused created fake firms to divert funds; Rs 300 crore linked to Swastik Desh Projects.
news.summary:
Haryana suspends 2 IAS officers amid Rs 590 crore IDFC First Bank scam probe.
Prime accused created fake firms to divert funds; Rs 300 crore linked to Swastik Desh Projects.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank's valuation shifts from attractive to very attractive despite mixed returns.
This reflects changing investor sentiment and metrics in private sector banking.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank's valuation shifts from attractive to very attractive despite mixed returns.
This reflects changing investor sentiment and metrics in private sector banking.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.
news.summary:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.
news.summary:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank reports strong loan growth but deposit growth falls short.
Granules India gets 4 US FDA observations; BCCL faces work stoppage issues.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank reports strong loan growth but deposit growth falls short.
Granules India gets 4 US FDA observations; BCCL faces work stoppage issues.

news.title:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.

news.title:
Nifty Bank dropped 16% in 5 weeks, with 8 stocks entering bear territory. IDFC First Bank fell 31%, YES Bank 26.5%.
State-owned banks saw heavy selling; Nifty PSU Bank index fell 20%. Rising yields and inflation fears hurt sentiment.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank dropped 16% in 5 weeks, with 8 stocks entering bear territory. IDFC First Bank fell 31%, YES Bank 26.5%.
State-owned banks saw heavy selling; Nifty PSU Bank index fell 20%. Rising yields and inflation fears hurt sentiment.

news.title:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.
news.summary:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank's loans and advances grew 20% YoY as of March 31, 2026.
Customer deposits at IDFC First Bank rose 17.2% YoY during the same period.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank's loans and advances grew 20% YoY as of March 31, 2026.
Customer deposits at IDFC First Bank rose 17.2% YoY during the same period.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.

news.title:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank fell 1.8% to Rs.61.82, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Mixed technical signals and valuation upgrade shaped a complex trading week for the bank.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank fell 1.8% to Rs.61.82, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Mixed technical signals and valuation upgrade shaped a complex trading week for the bank.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank board to meet on April 25, 2026, to approve Q4 & FY 2026 results.
Trading window closed for designated persons under insider trading rules till the announcement.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank board to meet on April 25, 2026, to approve Q4 & FY 2026 results.

news.title:
IDFC FIRST CEO confirms Q4 profit despite full Haryana fraud impact.
Credit costs expected to drop below 2% next year as MFI impact eases.
news.summary:

news.title:
IDFC First Bank expects FY27 as a breakthrough year despite a ₹600 crore fraud hit, maintaining profitability.
Bank reports strong core operations, stable deposits, easing credit costs, and steady 20% loan growth amid cautious macro monitoring.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank expects FY27 as a breakthrough year despite a ₹600 crore fraud hit, maintaining profitability.
Bank reports strong core operations, stable deposits, easing credit costs, and steady 20% loan growth amid cautious macro monitoring.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.
